description_long: This object is a large, single-edged knife with a pronounced forward curve, resembling a kukri or machete. The blade is broad and widens towards the tip, with a distinct belly that enhances chopping power. The handle is cylindrical, segmented for grip, and appears to be made of a dark, possibly synthetic or rubberized material, with a rounded pommel. There is a small, simple guard at the junction between the blade and handle, providing minimal hand protection. The entire object is a uniform dark color, giving it a tactical and utilitarian appearance. No decorative elements or ornamentation are visible on either the blade or handle.
description: A large, curved, single-edged knife with a broad blade and a segmented, dark handle. The design is utilitarian and lacks ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full curved blade profile and segmented handle.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, showing its rounded shape and grip texture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the blade's curve and handle details.
description_view_3: Blade tip view, showing the knife's thickness and the alignment of blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, segmented, dark, textured for grip, rounded pommel
